title: DIAGNOSE output — build-phase red diagnosis (skeleton or slice build)

blocked_record_ref.description: Path to blocked build-record.json or integration-record.json under diagnosis

locks_verified.description: All relevant locks (skeleton/adr/aprd/oracle) confirmed frozen; hashes not recomputed

red_under_diagnosis.description: Identity of the failing test/component/flow being diagnosed

from_role.description: Role that escalated: IMPLEMENT | INTEGRATE | VERIFY-OUTPUT

target.description: Component (IMPLEMENT) or flow F* (INTEGRATE) under build

failure_signature.description: Exact error message / assertion text from the failing test

provisional_hint.description: Producer's escape classification hint — HINT only, re-derived below, never trusted

classification.description: Provisional defect classification from the escalating role

route.description: Provisional route suggested by escalating role

flaky_check.description: Discriminator 1: whether failure is flaky (non-deterministic) or deterministic

deterministic.description: True = deterministic failure; false = flaky → flaky-quarantine verdict

action.description: When flaky: re-run/quarantine/harness-fix action. Null when deterministic

stall_analysis.description: Discriminator 2: whether build is progressing or stalled (K=3 same-signature + 0 net-new = stall)

same_signature_attempts.description: Count of attempts with the same failure signature

net_new_passes_trend.description: Trend in net-new passes across attempts: flat | rising

progressing.description: True = net-new passes rising; build still progressing → self-heal

stall_confirmed.description: True = K=3 same-signature + 0 net-new (incl. oscillation) → stall confirmed

reflection_pass.description: Discriminator 3: mandatory re-read of frozen inputs; determines misread vs genuinely-wrong frozen artifact

frozen_inputs_reread.description: Frozen artifact paths/refs re-read before verdict

finding.description: What the re-read revealed: misread vs genuine contract/decision defect

misread.description: True = implementation misread a correct frozen artifact → self-heal; false = frozen artifact is genuinely wrong → escape

skeleton_fidelity.description: Slice-build only: whether greening the red requires editing a frozen skeleton artifact (H14)

breached.description: True = defect is at shared baseline, not slice-local → escape Phase 2/3

skeleton_artifacts_checked.description: Frozen skeleton artifacts inspected during fidelity check

verdict.description: Diagnosis outcome: self-heal (misread/progressing) | escape (genuine frozen-artifact defect) | flaky-quarantine

classification.description: Confirmed defect class: my-code | contract | decision | WHAT | missing-foundation
Defect class: contract | decision | WHAT | missing-foundation

target_phase.description: Phase to route to: Phase 0 | Phase 1 | Phase 2 | Phase 3

frozen_ref.description: Path + anchor of the frozen artifact containing the defect

change_request.description: Concrete change request routable to the target phase

routable.description: True = frozen_ref + change_request named; false = insufficient to route

routable_diagnosis.description: Present iff verdict==escape; null otherwise. Names frozen_ref + change_request routable to a phase

route_back_to.description: Role to route back to: IMPLEMENT | INTEGRATE

corrected_understanding.description: Corrected reading of the frozen artifact that resolves the misread

misread_artifact.description: Path + anchor of the frozen artifact that was misread

self_heal.description: Present iff verdict==self-heal; null otherwise. route_back_to + corrected_understanding

rerun_count.description: Number of re-runs attempted to confirm flaky behaviour

harness_fix.description: Action to fix the flaky harness or quarantine the test

quarantine.description: Present iff verdict==flaky-quarantine; null otherwise. rerun_count + harness_fix + note

diagnosis_counts.description: Counts of discriminator gates fired and frozen inputs re-read

frozen_inputs_reread.description: Number of frozen artifact paths re-read in reflection_pass
